criteria_results.description: The `EditorObject` interface in `client/src/lib/types.ts` includes a new optional property `notes: string`.
criteria_results.evidence: File `client/src/lib/types.ts` defines `notes?: string;` within the `EditorObject` type (line 39).

criteria_results.description: A new file `client/src/components/editor/PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx` exists and exports a React component.
criteria_results.evidence: File `client/src/components/editor/PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx` exists and exports `PMObjectDetailsPanel` React functional component.

criteria_results.description: The `Rnd` component within `ObjectRenderer.tsx` has its `disableDragging` prop set based on a new prop passed into the `ObjectRenderer` component.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/Canvas/ObjectRenderer.tsx`, the `Rnd` component's `disableDragging` prop is set to `disableMovement || isTech || layer.locked || tool !== 'select' || isRotating` (line 144). Additionally, `enableResizing` is disabled when `disableMovement` is true (line 145).

criteria_results.description: `MobileBottomBar.tsx` imports and renders `PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx` when an object is selected and the user is a mobile PM.
criteria_results.evidence: In `client/src/components/editor/MobileBottomBar.tsx`, `PMObjectDetailsPanel` is imported and rendered inside a `DrawerContent` when `pmMobileDrawer` is true (lines 185-189). `pmMobileDrawer` is defined as `isPM && isMobile && selectedObject` (line 102).

criteria_results.description: The main reducer in `editor-context.tsx` contains a case to handle an action that updates the `notes` field of an object.
criteria_results.evidence: The `editorReducer` in `client/src/lib/editor-context.tsx` handles `UPDATE_OBJECT` (line 128) by merging updates into the object state. `PMObjectDetailsPanel.tsx` dispatches this action with `{ notes: e.target.value }` (line 25).

suggestions: Consider adding a validation step for label and notes length to prevent UI overflow on small mobile screens.

commit_message.subject: Restrict mobile PM movement and add object notes
commit_message.body: Implemented movement restrictions for Project Managers on mobile devices in ObjectRenderer.tsx. Added a 'notes' field to the EditorObject type and created a PMObjectDetailsPanel for mobile use, allowing PMs to edit labels and notes while preventing accidental movement or resizing of objects. Integrated the new panel into MobileBottomBar.tsx.
